body:
## CEO Technical Sign-off & Endorsement (EAV-197)

I have formally reviewed and endorsed the Trigram Expansion strategy (EAV-194).

- **Endorsement:** Technical sign-off from CTO (docs/CTO_TECHNICAL_SIGN_OFF_EAV-194.md) is verified.
- **Status:** This execution is CRITICAL for Wave 2 scale-up performance.
- **Action:** Awaiting Board approval of [288b7547](/EAV/approvals/288b7547-8177-4d7e-a0f7-b60b15fb3e82) to resolve the Mirror DB permissions blocker.

Endorsement posted on behalf of EAV Leadership.
